flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 43% at Navarro College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (4.0k vs 6.9k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Navarro College fell 42% between 2021 and 2024 (6.6k → 3.8k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Navarro College rose 17% between 2019 and 2022 (50.7% → 59.1%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Navarro College fell 15% between 2017 and 2020 ($13.0k → $11.0k).
